Round 1.para: Step into the world of Generative AI and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in this hands-on workshop. Participants will explore how modern AI systems can understand, retrieve, and generate accurate information using real data.
list: Understanding LLMs, embeddings, and vector databases
Building a simple student records & academics AI application
Round 1.para1: This workshop equips participants with practical skills for building AI-powered academic systems and understanding real-world applications of RAG architecture in education and industry.

event_rules: Participants must actively engage in hands-on activities.
Any unethical behaviour will result in immediate expulsion from the workshop.
event_requirements: Valid identification and proof of registration are required.
